item.description: ### Changed - **A clearer usage view.** Each limit is now a labelled progress bar instead of a cramped line of numbers — 5-hour, weekly, and each per-model window, filling green → amber → red as you approach the cap. A limit you've hit is tinted red so it's obvious at a glance, spend and credits move to their own spot on the right, and the bars use the full width. Reset times still tap to switch between a countdown and the exact time.
